title: SpongeBob Pack
description: One of most downloaded packs from my discord server.
body:
# 🧽 SpongeBob PvP Resource Pack — fun under the sea 🌊

**✨ Short Description**  
The SpongeBob PvP Pack brings the goofy, colorful world of Bikini Bottom straight into your Minecraft fights ⚔️. With SpongeBob-themed HUD, textures, and a custom sky full of underwater vibes, you’ll never have a boring duel again.

---

## 💎 Features
- 🌊 Custom SpongeBob-themed skybox with cartoon details.  
- 🧽 SpongeBob HUD icons (hearts, hunger bar, totems, etc.).  
- 🗡️ Golden-styled swords & clean PvP-ready item textures.  
- 🎨 Bright and colorful armor textures for diamond & netherite.  
- ⚡ Optimized resolution (16×16) for smooth performance.  

---

## 📥 Installation
1. ⬇️ Download the `.zip` from Modrinth.  
2. ⚙️ Open Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs → “Open Pack Folder”.  
3. 📂 Place the zip inside (no need to unzip).  
4. 🔄 Enable the pack.

---

## 🔗 Compatibility
- 🖥️ Minecraft versions: **1.20 - 1.21.3**  
- ✅ Works with most PvP clients ([FoxClient](https://www.foxclient.eu), Lunar, Badlion, Feather, etc.).

---
